headline: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Prime Day offers unprecedented deals on Apple products. Apple Watch Series 11 hits a new low price. AirPods Pro 3 are discounted to $179.

headline: The 16 best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
summary: Prime Day features significant discounts on robot vacuums. Top retailers like Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart are participating. It's an ideal time to buy a robot vacuum at a reduced price.

headline: Charlie Kirk’s legacy is a 30-year sentence for moving zines
summary: Charlie Kirk's death sparks a crackdown on free speech. The Trump administration targets 'antifa' in response. Eight Texans face severe sentences for moving zines.

headline: Microsoft introduces cheaper Surface devices with half the memory
summary: Microsoft launches more affordable 12-inch Surface Pro and 13-inch Surface Laptop. New models feature 8GB RAM, half the memory of standard versions. Prices start at $849 for Surface Pro and $949 for Surface Laptop.

headline: Save $100 Off the BowFlex SelectTech Adjustable Dumbbells for Amazon Prime Day
summary: BowFlex SelectTech Adjustable Dumbbells are $100 off. This Prime Day deal features a gold-standard fitness product. Grab these highly-rated adjustable weights now.

headline: GTA 6 May Be Borrowing a Major Mechanic from Red Dead Redemption 2
summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 might adopt a significant mechanic from Red Dead Redemption 2. This potential feature could divide GTA fans. The rumored mechanic's impact on gameplay is yet to be seen.

headline: Save $100 Off the BowFlex Results Series SelectTech Dumbbells for Amazon Prime Day
summary: Save $100 on BowFlex Results Series SelectTech Dumbbells this Prime Day. Achieve fitness goals with these discounted adjustable weights. Don't miss this opportunity to 'get swole'.

headline: The Project Hail Mary 4K UHD Preorder Price Drops to a New Low for Amazon Prime Day
summary: Project Hail Mary 4K UHD preorder price hits a new low. This Prime Day deal makes the film even more affordable. Secure your copy despite the lack of a release date.

headline: UK sees hottest June day on record as 36.1C recorded in Hampshire
summary: The UK experienced its hottest June day ever. Temperatures reached 36.1C in Hampshire. Heat records were shattered across southern England.

headline: Why this heatwave feels worse than the last one
summary: Current heatwave feels more uncomfortable than previous ones. Various factors contribute to the heightened discomfort. Simon King explains the reasons behind this perceived difference.

headline: Babies and mothers died after 'systemic and sustained' failings, largest NHS maternity review finds
summary: Largest NHS maternity review uncovers systemic and sustained failings. Numerous babies and mothers died due to these issues. The review also identifies a 'bullying and toxic culture'.

headline: 'From excitement to emptiness': Families affected by largest NHS maternity scandal tell their stories
summary: Families share heartbreaking stories from the NHS maternity scandal. They describe a journey 'from excitement to emptiness'. The article details their experiences in the biggest scandal of its kind.
